data.body:
[Total Assaut Special Supplies Notice]

Sensei, check out these 5-day special supplies celebrating the new Torment difficulty in Total Assault - Hieronymus (Urban Warfare)!
Be sure to log in every day and collect 'em all!

🗓️Event Period: 8/29 (Tue) 3:00 AM ~ 9/5 (Tue) 2:59 PM (UTC)
